title: rubus × stellulans
intro: Rubus × stellulans, also known as Stellalina blackberry or Stellalina raspberry, is a hybrid plant between the European blackberry (Rubus fruticosus) and the raspberry (Rubus idaeus). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects, making it useful for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Rubus × stellulans include its potential to lower blood sugar levels, improve cardiovascular health, and act as an antiviral agent. Herbal preparations of Rubus × stellulans include teas, jams, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
